title: Kindergarten Math Quest
description: Fun math games for ages 4-5! Count cute animals, match shapes, and compare sizes.

quests.title: Counting Zoo
quests.description: Help count all the animals in the safari zoo!

questions.prompt: How many happy lions can you count?
questions.mascotHint: Tap each lion to count them! 1... 2... 3!

questions.prompt: How many friendly frogs are sitting in the pond?
questions.mascotHint: Green frogs love to jump! Let's count them together.

questions.prompt: How many sweet strawberries are ready to eat?
questions.mascotHint: Yum, strawberries! Count all of them on the screen.

questions.prompt: How many shiny stars are in the night sky?
questions.mascotHint: Make a wish! Count all the yellow stars.

quests.title: Size Safari
quests.description: Spot the biggest and smallest animals in the wild!

questions.prompt: Which animal is the BIGGEST?
questions.mascotHint: Look at the giant elephant! It towers over the mouse.

questions.prompt: Which fruit is the SMALLEST?
questions.mascotHint: The tiny red cherry is much smaller than the watermelon!

questions.prompt: Who has MORE cookies?
questions.mascotHint: Mmm, cookies! Five is a bigger number than two.

quests.title: Shape Island
quests.description: Find hidden shapes and match them up!

questions.prompt: Find the shape that is a CIRCLE (round like a wheel)!
questions.mascotHint: Circles have no corners and roll all around!

questions.prompt: Find the shape with exactly THREE corners (a TRIANGLE)!
questions.mascotHint: Triangles look like pizza slices! Count the 3 corners.

questions.prompt: Which item looks like a clock or wheel (Circle)?
questions.mascotHint: A delicious donut is round, just like a circle!

quests.title: Ocean Counting
quests.description: Dive deep under the water and count the ocean animals!

questions.prompt: How many friendly octopuses can you count?
questions.mascotHint: Count the purple octopuses floating in the water!

questions.prompt: How many playful dolphins are jumping?
questions.mascotHint: Look at the happy dolphins! Let's count them one by one.

questions.prompt: How many colorful fish are swimming by?
questions.mascotHint: So many bright yellow and orange fish! Count them all.

questions.prompt: How many little baby sharks can you see?
questions.mascotHint: Sharks can be friendly too! Let's count them carefully up to 10.

quests.title: Pattern Garden
quests.description: Grow a beautiful garden by figuring out the patterns!

questions.prompt: What flower comes next in the garden?

data.tip: Look at the pattern of flowers! What comes next? 🌸 🌻 🌸 🌻...

questions.mascotHint: It goes pink flower, sunflower, pink flower, sunflower... what comes next?

questions.prompt: What fruit is missing from the line?

data.tip: Apple, banana, apple, banana! What is next? 🍎 🍌 🍎 🍌...

questions.mascotHint: The pattern starts over with the red fruit!

questions.prompt: Find the missing insect helper!

data.tip: Count them: butterfly, butterfly, bee! butterfly, butterfly...

questions.mascotHint: Two butterflies are always followed by one busy bee.

questions.prompt: Which color circle completes the path?
questions.mascotHint: First red, then yellow, and last is...

quests.title: Bakery Sums
quests.description: Add the tasty treats together in the Animal Bakery!

questions.prompt: How many sweet donuts do we have in total?
questions.mascotHint: One yummy donut on the left and one on the right. Put them together!

questions.prompt: How many delicious cupcakes can you count?
questions.mascotHint: Count the cupcakes! 2 sweet cupcakes plus 1 more cupcake make...

questions.prompt: What is the total number of chocolate chip cookies?
questions.mascotHint: Let's count them: 3 cookies on the left plus 2 on the right is...
